messages.content:
translate "Great as a gift or to elevate your own daily dining
Use for coffee, tea, espresso and other hot or cold beverages
CAUTION: Cups may become heated during microwaving. Use an oven mitt to remove from microwave." into french

"Ils sont parfaits comme cadeau ou pour rehausser vos repas quotidiens
Utilisez-les pour le café, le thé, l'espresso et autres boissons chaudes ou froides
ATTENTION : Les tasses peuvent devenir chaudes lors de la mise au micro-ondes. Utilisez un gant de cuisine pour les retirer du micro-ondes."

translate "Free from BPA
Dishwasher- and microwave-safe" into french
translate "Diamond Textured Kitchen Towel & Cloth Set" into french
"Ensemble de serviette et chiffon de cuisine à texture diamant"
translate "Diamond Textured Kitchen Cloth Trio" into french
"Trio de chiffons de cuisine à texture diamant"
translate "Diamond Textured Kitchen Cloth" into french
translate "Diamond Textured Kitchen Towel" into french
